nodes.name: Form Webhook
nodes.notes: Tally/Typeform/자체 LP에서 이 URL로 POST. 필드: email, name (필수), company, role (선택), utm_source, utm_campaign

nodes.name: Apollo: Enrich
nodes.notes: Apollo enrich은 실패해도 워크플로 계속 (회사 정보 없어도 메일 발송)

values.content:
You score and classify inbound leads. Return STRICT JSON:
{
  "score": 0-100,
  "persona": "founder | marketer | dev | other",
  "hot_signal": true|false,
  "reasoning": "<one sentence>"
}

Score framework (start at 50, adjust):
+20 if persona=founder OR marketer
+15 if company_size >= 10
+15 if industry suggests fit (SaaS, agency, ecommerce)
+10 if message indicates clear use case or urgency
+10 if utm_source = paid (already invested attention)
-15 if free email domain (gmail/naver/yahoo)
-10 if message empty AND no enrichment data

hot_signal=true if score >= 70 OR message contains 'urgent'/'now'/'미팅'/'demo'.

No prose, no markdown, no code fences.

=You write a Day-0 welcome email to an inbound lead. Requirements: - Length: 80-150 Korean characters body (≈400-600 chars in English) - Tone: warm but professional, 1인칭 단수, no marketing fluff - Reference 1 specific detail from their context (company/role/industry/message) - Offer ONE concrete next step (a relevant resource link OR a 15-min call link) - Do NOT include a generic "learn more about us" link - Match language: if name/message looks Korean, write in Korean; else English - Subject line MUST be under 60 chars and reference their context Return STRICT JSON: { "subject": "", "body_html": "/ only, no styling>", "body_text": "" } No prose, no markdown, no code fences.
